_doc: Return shapes of resolveBrandDomain() and the stage wrapper runBrandResolver().

function_return.confidence: number (0-1, LLM-derived via parseConfidence()) or null

confidence_behavior: cache hit: parseConfidence(cached.confidence) — stored value, clamped 0-1, null if missing
LLM success with officialDomain: parseConfidence(result?.confidence) — LLM-provided
LLM success without officialDomain: null (no resolution = no confidence)
empty brand / no callLlmFn / LLM error: null
confidence IS model-derived — parseConfidence() clamps to 0-1 (values >1 divided by 100)
caller_statuses: resolved_empty — LLM was available but returned no officialDomain

stage_wrapper_return.brandResolution: object|null — the resolveBrandDomain() result or null
stage_wrapper_return._note: Orchestrator applies brand promotion inline — checks brandResolution.officialDomain and adds to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains directly. See orchestrator_promotion_application.

brand_resolved_event_shape._note: candidates field removed — no longer emitted

caller_side_effects: brand_resolved logger event emitted by stage wrapper
orchestrator applies brand promotion inline to categoryConfig after stage completes

logic: Builds a manufacturer host entry inline: { host, tierName: 'manufacturer', sourceId: 'brand_<host>', displayName, crawlConfig, fieldCoverage: null, robotsTxtCompliant: true, baseUrl }
Adds entry to categoryConfig.sourceHosts and sourceHostMap (if not already present)

artifact_note: There is no dedicated brand_resolver.json artifact in the live runtime.
